name: Target Red and White Dot Table Cover - Spritz™
description:
Bring a classic touch to your table with the Target Red and White Dot Table Cover from Spritz™. This stylish table cover features a timeless red and white dots, perfect for any gathering. Made from durable polyethylene material, it ensures easy setup and hassle-free cleanup, so you can focus on enjoying the party. Whether it's a picnic, birthday, or casual get-together, this table cover adds a charming vibe to your event.


Spritz™: Pops of joy that make the moment™.
